person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Father Sir Thomas Pabenham, Sheriff of Northampton d. 18 Sep 1344

Mother Alice Offard d. a 1346

Sir Laurence Pabenham was born circa 1334 at of Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England; Age 11 in 1345.

He married Elizabeth d' Engaine, daughter of Sir John d' Engaine, 2nd Lord Engaine and Joan Peverel, before 1372; They had 1 son (Laurence) & 1 daughter (Katherine, wife of Sir William Cheyne, & of Sir Thomas Aylesbury).

Sir Laurence Pabenham married Joan Daubeney, daughter of Sir Giles Daubeney, Sheriff of Bedford & Buckingham and Alianore de Wylyngton, before 1390; They had 1 son (John) & 1 daughter (Eleanor, wife of John Tyringham).

Sir Laurence Pabenham died on 10 June 1399 at of Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England; Buried in the church of Offard Darcy, Huntingdonshire.


«b»Family 1«/b»
Elizabeth d' Engaine b. c 1341, d. 23 Sep 1377

«b»Children:«/b»
1.) Laurence

2.) Katherine, wife of Sir William Cheyne, & of Sir Thomas Aylesbury

«b»Family 2«/b»
Joan Daubeney b. c 1368

«b»Children:«/b»
1.) John

2.) Eleanor, wife of John Tyringham

«b»Property
Pytchley Manor«/b»
"Pytchley then followed the descent of Weldon until 1408, when, on the death of Richard Basset, the property was divided between his cousins, Weldon passing to John Knyvet and Pytchley to Sir Thomas Aylesbury, who died in 1418 seised of a manor of Pytchley, composed of the manor of Pytchley called Engaynes and of this manor, then called BASSETS and later on known as STAFFORDS. Bassets, held by him of the abbey of Peterborough, had been granted by him in 1416\endash 17 to Sir Thomas Chaworth, the husband of his daughter Isabel, but was assigned for life to his widow Katharine. Katharine, who had inherited the Engayne manor as the daughter of Lawrence de Pabenham, died on 17 July 1436, leaving as her heir her son Laurence Cheyne, aged 40.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Laurence de Pabenham於大約1334年出生在英國坎布利其爾芬 德雷頓時，他的父親Thomas de Pabenham36歲，母親Alice de Ufford25歲。他於1370年與Elizabeth Engaine在英國諾薩普頓史爾騰福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1399年6月10日在英國貝德福爾帕文哈姆享年66歲，埋葬在英國亨廷格多史爾奧福德 達阿希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Laurence de Pabenham于大约1334年出生在英国坎布利其爾芬 德雷頓时，他的父亲Thomas de Pabenham36岁，母亲Alice de Ufford25岁。他于1370年与Elizabeth Engaine在英国諾薩普頓史爾騰福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1399年6月10日在英国貝德福爾帕文哈姆享年66岁，埋葬在英国亨廷格多史爾奧福德 達阿希。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pabenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pakenham (Suffolk). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Pacca (genitive Paccan) + hām ‘village, homestead’.
History: A family of this name has been established in Westmeath, Ireland, since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Laurence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French form of Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’. Laurentum was a town in Latium, which may have got its name from Latin laurus ‘laurel’, although it is more probably of pre-Roman origin. The given name was moderately popular in the Middle Ages (when it was used for girls as well as boys), under the influence of a 3rd-century saint who was one of the seven deacons of Rome. He was martyred in 258 . The legend is that, having been required to hand over the Church's treasures to the civil authorities, he assembled the poor and sick and presented them. For this act of Christian defiance, he was roasted to death on a gridiron. In England the name is also associated with St Laurence of Canterbury ( d. 619 ). A more recent influence has been the actor Sir Laurence Olivier ( 1907–89 ). See also Lawrence .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Laurence de Pabenham was born about 1334, in Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Thomas de Pabenham, was 36 and his mother, Alice de Ufford, was 25. He married Elizabeth Engaine in 1370, in Thenford, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 10 June 1399, in Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Offord D'arcy, Huntingdonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Laurence de Pabenham est né environ 1334, à Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Pabenham, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice de Ufford, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Engaine en 1370, à Thenford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 juin 1399, à Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Offord D'arcy, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Laurence de Pabenham um 1334 in Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Pabenham 36 und seine Mutter Alice de Ufford 25. Er hat 1370 in Thenford, Northamptonshire, England Elizabeth Engaine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Juni 1399 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Offord D'arcy, Huntingdonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Laurence de Pabenham è nato il circa 1334 nel Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Pabenham, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Ufford, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Engaine nel 1370, nel Thenford, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 giugno 1399, nel Pavenham, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Offord D'arcy, Huntingdonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Laurence de Pabenhamが約1334年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアフン ドレイトンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Pabenhamは36歳，母Alice de Uffordは25歳であった。1370年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスエンフォードでElizabeth Engaineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1399年6月10日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアプエイベンハムで66歳で死去し，イギリスハンティングドンシュアイアオフォード ド'アルシにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Laurence de Pabenham(이)가 대략 1334년 영국 캄브리지실르 펜 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Pabenham(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Ufford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1370년 영국 노르섬프토실르 테퍼드에서 Elizabeth Engaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1399년 6월 10일 영국 베드퍼드실르 파븐함에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 헌틴그도실르 퍼드 드'아르시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Laurence de Pabenham nasceu aproximadamente 1334, em Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Pabenham, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Ufford, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Engaine em 1370, em Thenford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de junho de 1399, em Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Offord D'arcy, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Laurence de Pabenham родился около 1334 г. в местности фен дреитон, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Pabenham было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Ufford, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Engaine в 1370 г. в местности тенфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 июня 1399 г. в местности павенам, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности оффорд д'арси, хантингдоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Laurence de Pabenham nació aproximadamente 1334, en Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Pabenham, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alice de Ufford, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Engaine en 1370, en Thenford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de junio de 1399, en Pavenham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Offord D'arcy, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra.
